name: Anar-Crimsonmoss
personality: Anar-Crimsonmoss gleams with the iridescent sheen of a capybara who just discovered feature flags and has been flipping them ever since — its @ eyes dart between monitoring dashboards mid-deploy like they're stock tickers. Waiting for consensus is a foreign concept; this capy ships first and apologizes never.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
